description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted outdoor air conditioning unit with a robust metal casing and a light gray finish. The front face features a large, square ventilation grille with horizontal slats, behind which a prominent fan is visible. To the right of the grille, there is a smooth panel displaying a 'FROSTY' brand logo with a stylized mountain graphic. The sides and back of the unit are mostly plain, with some access panels and mounting brackets visible for secure attachment to a wall. The base of the unit has two sturdy feet or brackets for stability, and the rear includes additional venting for airflow. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and efficient air exchange.
description: A rectangular, wall-mounted outdoor air conditioner with a large front grille, visible fan, and a 'FROSTY' logo on a smooth panel. The unit is light gray, with sturdy mounting brackets and minimalistic side panels.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the large ventilation grille, visible fan, 'FROSTY' logo, and mounting feet.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the plain back panel, access hatch, and mounting brackets.
description_view_2: Rear-right view showing the smooth, featureless back and side, with mounting brackets visible.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the grille, fan, logo, and side vent slats.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'FROSTY' logo with a stylized black mountain and blue accent, located on the front right panel.
attribute_grille_pattern: Horizontal slats forming a square grille, evenly spaced, covering the fan on the front face.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Multiple horizontal vents on the left and right sides, louvered design for directional airflow.
